creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

You need to update your installed packages _from ports_.  There was a bad 
8.1 metacity package.  If you use portmaster or portupgrade to upgrade 
your installed packages using an up-to-date ports tree, you will end up 
with GNOME 2.30.2 and metacity-2.30.1_3, and this problem will go away.
